englishDefinitions: A slang phrase meaning excellent, very good, or impressive, especially in older American slang.
Can also relate to complaining or criticizing, depending on context, though the phrase is uncommon and highly informal.
persianTranslation: در بعضی بافت‌ها: غر زدن یا شکایت کردن
examples: That was a bitchen car back in the 1970s.
The band played a bitchen set last night.
The word bitching can mean complaining in some contexts.
